home.title:
Breakthrough Productivity with

Multi-Agent AI
home.subtitle: AgentX Platform enables businesses to easily build, operate, and monitor smart digital workforces. Automate complex processes through Specialist Agents via Model Context Protocol.
home.feature.specialist.title: Specialist Agents
home.feature.specialist.desc: Build highly specialized Agents, define skills, and assign roles to operate automatically towards goals.
home.feature.mcp.title: MCP Integrations
home.feature.mcp.desc: Connect limitlessly to databases, APIs, and file systems via standard Model Context Protocol.
home.feature.knowledge.title: Knowledge Base (RAG)
home.feature.knowledge.desc: Integrate enterprise knowledge base using pgvector RAG to provide Agents with highly contextualized answers.
home.feature.security.title: Audit Logs & Security
home.feature.security.desc: Monitor tool execution history and token costs comprehensively, securing API keys with AES-256 encryption.
